expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly addresses the case focus by stating what Phase 6 must show regarding layering and executable wording: it lists “Layering is preserved (final layered structure)” and “Executable wording / few-shot cleanup is applied,” including required `quality_delta` sections. It also reiterates in “Benchmark expectation coverage” that the focus is explicitly covered but cannot be demonstrated due to missing artifacts.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: The output is framed around Phase 6 contract alignment: “What Phase 6 must show (contract expectations)” and “Evidence missing to validate Phase 6,” and it concludes “Cannot demonstrate Phase 6 compliance from provided evidence.” This aligns the evaluation with primary phase phase6 even though it reports non-verifiability due to missing Phase 6 artifacts.
